creator: dettus@dettus.net
text:
Created attachment 238765
The patch to the Repository.

I have this oldskool MP3 player project, d11amp.
After being able to release version 0.59, I took the liberty of creating a patch for the FreeBSD ports repository for it, please find it attached to this report.

Hopefully it meets your quality standards, it would be amazing it it would become an official package one day.


You can find some screenshots here: https://www.dettus.net/d11amp/
It can handle skins from https://skins.webamp.org as well.


Enjoy!


P.S.: I already opened Bug #268206, but since I uploaded the port in the wrong format, I thought it would be best to "bump" it with a new ticket to avoid confustion. My apologies.
